name: dashboard
title: Dashboard
description: User dashboard with projects, teams, API keys, deployments, downloads, tools, stats, and revenue chart.

files.content:
import { Link } from "@/components/primitives/link"; import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { CodeWindow } from "@/components/ui/code-window"; import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs"; import { routes } from "@/config/routes"; import { siteConfig } from "@/config/site-config"; const installationCode = `# Clone the repository git clone ${siteConfig.repo.url} # Change directory cd ${siteConfig.branding.projectSlug} # Install dependencies bun install --frozen-lockfile # Start the development server bun dev`; const dockerCode = `# Clone the repository git clone ${siteConfig.repo.url} # Change directory cd ${siteConfig.branding.projectSlug} # Build the Docker image docker build -t ${siteConfig.branding.projectSlug} . # Run the container docker run -p 3000:3000 ${siteConfig.branding.projectSlug}`; export function DashboardTabs({ hasGitHubConnection }: { hasGitHubConnection: boolean }) { return ( Overview Downloads Analytics Reports Notifications Settings
System Overview Real-time system metrics and performance
Chart placeholder
Download {siteConfig.title} Download the latest version of {siteConfig.title} directly, or connect your GitHub account to get automatic updates, features, and support!
{hasGitHubConnection && ( <>

Quick Install

Clone the repository with{" "} then install dependencies with{" "}

Full Installation Steps

Using Docker

)} {!hasGitHubConnection && (

Connect GitHub to:

  • Access the repository directly
  • Get automatic updates
  • Access GitHub support
)}

Need help? Check out our{" "} documentation {" "} or{" "} contact support .

Analytics Dashboard Detailed metrics and performance analytics
Analytics dashboard placeholder
Generated Reports View and download system reports
Reports section placeholder
System Notifications Important alerts and system messages
Notifications section placeholder
Dashboard Settings Customize your dashboard experience
Settings section placeholder
); }

"use client"; import { Bar, BarChart, CartesianGrid, XAxis } from "recharts"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { type ChartConfig, ChartContainer, ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent, } from "@/components/ui/chart"; import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow, } from "@/components/ui/table"; import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs"; import { bounceRateData, pageViewsData, statusVariant, teamMembers } from "./mock-data"; const pageViewsConfig = { views: { label: "Page Views", color: "hsl(var(--chart-1))", }, } satisfies ChartConfig; const bounceRateConfig = { rate: { label: "Bounce Rate %", color: "hsl(var(--chart-3))", }, } satisfies ChartConfig; export function OverviewTabs() { return ( Overview Analytics Reports Team Members Your team and their current status. Name Role Status Last Active {teamMembers.map((member) => ( {member.name} {member.role} {member.status} {member.lastActive} ))}
Page Views Monthly page views over the last 6 months } /> Bounce Rate Monthly bounce rate trend } />
Export Reports Download your data in various formats. ); }

docs: User dashboard with projects, teams, API keys, deployments, downloads, and analytics charts. Requires `auth` block for session management and `DATABASE_URL` for data persistence. Install `payments` block for subscription-aware features.
